issues.risk: Release signing is optional when secrets are absent. Local release output produced unsigned inspection artifacts and signingReport showed release Config: null.
issues.fix: Configure release signing secrets or Play App Signing and verify a signed AAB before tester or Play distribution.

issues.snippet: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_profiles_friend_code
issues.risk: Repo contains targeted index migrations, not a full replayable Supabase schema/RLS/storage/function configuration. Live DB may work, but production infrastructure is not reproducible from version control.
issues.fix: After the DB freeze, add and verify full schema, RLS, storage bucket/policy, function config, and bootstrap documentation from a clean Supabase project.

issues.risk: Function source validates bearer shape only. If platform JWT verification is disabled or misconfigured, bearer-shaped values can reach paid provider proxy code.
issues.fix: Retire or force-update old clients, enable strict JWT verification, and verify invalid bearer tokens return 401.

issues.snippet: Because this workspace does not include `app/google-services.json`, Crashlytics dashboard delivery, ANR visibility, and release mapping upload are not verified yet.
issues.risk: Public production would lack verified crash/ANR delivery and release mapping upload evidence.
issues.fix: Restore Firebase config via local/CI secrets and verify non-fatal, fatal, ANR, and mapping upload in release builds.

issues.risk: CI verifies unit/lint/build paths but no emulator/device smoke lane was found, and no device was attached during this audit.
issues.fix: Add and run emulator or real-device smoke tests for auth, permissions, map, mission camera/photo flow, widget, notifications, and deep links.

issues.risk: A credential-like password literal is stored in test source. The value is intentionally redacted in this audit artifact to avoid duplicating the secret.
issues.fix: Move test credentials to local/CI secrets and rotate the account if it is real.

issues.risk: Precise location is written to profile state; production needs verified disclosure, friend-visibility rules, and an explicit sharing control.
issues.fix: Add explicit location-sharing disclosure/toggle and verify RLS plus Play Data Safety wording.

issues.risk: Google sign-in starts OAuth but does not persist remember-me state like the email login path, which can cause inconsistent next-launch routing.
issues.fix: Define OAuth remember-me semantics and persist or bypass remember-me consistently for Google sign-in.

issues.risk: App-side App Links are configured, but host-side assetlinks and device verification are manual/unproven.
issues.fix: Deploy https://wanderly.app/.well-known/assetlinks.json and verify with pm get-app-links on a device.

issues.risk: Combined Gradle verification fails because apkSizeReport consumes package outputs without a declared dependency or artifact provider.
issues.fix: Wire apkSizeReport to package/assemble outputs or use explicit artifact providers so combined Gradle invocations pass.

issues.risk: Lint passed but reports 121 issues, including accessibility/content-description debt on UI imagery.
issues.fix: Triage lint warnings and clear accessibility/content-description warnings first.

issues.risk: Paid provider proxy paths exist, but repo evidence for per-user/server-side rate limits is missing.
issues.fix: Add provider quotas/spend alerts and server-side or function-level rate limiting when backend changes are allowed.

issues.risk: Friendship insertion assumes live DB constraints, but repo migrations do not show unordered uniqueness or self-friendship prevention.
issues.fix: Add DB constraints and RLS policy tests after the DB freeze.

issues.risk: A data-sync foreground service starts after session availability; Play policy declaration and user-visible need were not verified.
issues.fix: Verify notification behavior, Play foreground-service declaration, and whether this can be downgraded to less intrusive background work.

issues.risk: Large UI controllers make future fixes and regression review slower.
issues.fix: Split avatar, sharing, admin visibility, and profile rendering into smaller helpers after release blockers.

issues.risk: Baseline profile support is scaffolded, but there is no generated performance artifact or startup budget.
issues.fix: Generate baseline profiles on device/emulator and enforce startup/size thresholds.

issues.risk: Widget receiver is exported and a custom refresh action exists; external refresh behavior should be reviewed even if throttled.
issues.fix: Confirm external refresh cannot cause abuse beyond the throttled path or protect the custom refresh action.

issues.risk: Only a UIAutomator XML dump was available; current visual screenshots/reference HTML were absent, so visual QA is incomplete.
issues.fix: Capture current device screenshots for auth, home, map, profile, gems, missions, widget, and empty/error states.
